stdout:
Audit complete. Screenshots saved in:

[docs/paradisio_app/screenshots/audit](C:/Users/oscar/AI%20WORKBENCH/Mekatelyu/docs/paradisio_app/screenshots/audit)

Files created:
- `01-homepage.png`
- `02-homepage-search-cacao.png`
- `03-black-bamboo-fullpage.png`
- `04-classifieds.png`
- `05-classifieds-search-bike.png`

Functionally working:
- Homepage loads from `file://`.
- Directory search works: `cacao` filters from `750` results to `7`.
- Black Bamboo detail page loads and has name, rating, WhatsApp CTA, map, badges, QR section, and claim link.
- Classifieds page loads.
- Classifieds search works: `bike` filters to `1 of 15 listings`.

Broken / suspicious:
- Classifieds category chips do not work as jump links. Example: `For Sale (2)` links to `#cat-for-sale`, but no matching target exists, so clicking does not scroll.
- Classifieds section headings render as `2 (2)`, `1 (1)`, etc. instead of category names like `Events`, `For Sale`, `Jobs`.

Bottom line: the app is mostly functionally working for browsing/detail/search, but classifieds category navigation/section labeling is broken.
